overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Kronenwetter Plan Commission was scheduled to meet to discuss and take possible action on a twin home concept plan and review the Green Tree Subdivision proposal. The meeting was set to receive public comment on these development matters affecting the community.

discussions.body: The Plan Commission was scheduled to discuss and consider possible action on a twin home concept plan. This item was listed under Old Business, indicating it was expected to continue from a previous meeting.
The Plan Commission was set to review and consider possible action on the Green Tree Subdivision proposal. This item was categorized as New Business on the agenda.

publicComment: Public comment was on the agenda, limited to 15 minutes total with a three-minute time period per person, with possible time extension at the Chief Presiding Officer's discretion.
actionItems: Scheduled to discuss and take possible action on twin home concept plan
Scheduled to discuss and take possible action on Green Tree Subdivision
title: Plan Commission Meeting - 2026-06-15
